text:
It's always interesting to hear about someone’s favorite moments. When was the last time something like that happened?

Oh, last Christmas... I got up early one morning to surprise my wife. I had decorated the kitchen. We had a big Christmas meal. I poured us some wine.

Then something happened.

She saw something on my phone. It was a picture—a deer that somehow flew!

We had to call an ambulance. I was freaking out. She said everything was okay. That it was just an eastern bluebird.

I think about that sometimes. Our lives—full of unexpected moments.

Oh. You know what?

Last weekend. I went boating. That was the first time someone had seen the rare Great horned owl. I saw a face.

Now there are moments I cherish.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
